chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI JCM No. 27 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on CMA No. 335/2026. (if granted) 2. For orders on CMA No. 336/2026. 07.05.2026. Mr. Hamza H. Hidayatullah, Advocate for the Petitioners. ********** 1. Urgency granted. 2. Learned counsel for the Petitioners, under instructions, states that he wishes to unconditionally withdraw the instant Petition, and has filed CMA No. 336/2026 accordingly. The said CMA No. 336/2026 is granted as prayed and the Petition stands dismissed accordingly. JUDGE AYAZ
